Education

Guest WiFi for education, without flooding the helpdesk on move-in day.

Schools, colleges, and universities need staff access that's identity-led and student accommodation that doesn't generate a queue of tickets. A branded captive portal covers campus visitors, while the Purple app provisions staff sign-in and a student's private network bubble.

Staff sign-in tied to the identity provider, not a shared password
A private network bubble per student, set up in the app
Browserless devices, consoles, TVs, connect without a portal
The conversation

What your customer is dealing with right now.

A flood of helpdesk tickets every move-in week

Students arrive with personal devices, consoles, TVs, printers, that can't authenticate to the enterprise network through a captive portal. iPSK and the Purple app give every student a private bubble that's ready before they arrive.

Staff and student networks that aren't properly separated

Faculty and administrative staff need identity-based access that's separate from student traffic, with automated offboarding when contracts end or staff move on.

Open days and campus visitors with no easy way online

Parents, prospective students, and conference guests need fast, branded WiFi without touching the student or staff network. Guest WiFi gets visitors online in seconds while capturing a verified, opted-in contact for admissions and marketing.

Where Purple fits

The products that solve it.

MULTI-TENANT WIFI
Ready before move-in day, no ticket required

iPSK and the Purple app give every student a private network bubble set up before they arrive, so consoles, TVs, and personal devices connect without a portal.

Per-unit network isolation, via iPSK
STAFF WIFI
Staff access, properly separated from student traffic

WPA3-Enterprise ties faculty and administrative access to identity, kept separate from student traffic, with automated offboarding when contracts end.

Works with Entra ID, Google & Okta
GUEST WIFI
Campus visitors online in seconds

Parents, prospective students, and conference guests get fast, branded WiFi without touching the student or staff network, capturing a verified, opted-in contact for admissions.

Branded captive portal or seamless connection
Powered by the Purple app

Every login in education runs through the same app.

Whichever product opens the deal, staff sign-in, a guest's first connection, or a resident provisioning their network, it all happens in the same Purple app. That's one engine to explain, one experience to demo, and one channel that keeps paying off after the first login.

Proof point

Built on the same identity infrastructure already trusted by 80,000 venues.

iPSK gives every student a private bubble that's ready before move-in, without a single support ticket, on the same platform already proven at scale: ISO 27001 and GDPR/CCPA compliant, with a 99.999% cloud RADIUS uptime SLA.

80k+
venues worldwide
iPSK
browserless device support
Marketing support

Need co-branded materials for education?

Request sector-specific campaign packs, one-pagers, and co-branded assets for education deals, including Purple app collateral you can hand straight to a prospect.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.

Purple Partners, the channel program for resellers, MSPs, and systems integrators selling identity-based WiFi solutions.
